common.searchProducts: Search products by name, SKU, or barcode

hero.title: Smart Billing & Business Management for Modern Teams
hero.description: Create invoices, manage inventory, track sales, and grow your business - all in one place.
hero.previewSubtitle: Billing, inventory, and growth in one place
hero.floatingCardValue: Invoices move from draft to paid without spreadsheet chasing
hero.floatingInsightValue: Track revenue, stock pressure, and team activity together
hero.sideCardOneDescription: Keep receivables visible and assign follow-up before cash flow slips.
hero.sideCardTwoDescription: Forecast-led alerts keep your next purchase decision clear.

features.trustedBy: Built to replace disconnected tools and manual ledgers
features.title: Everything your team needs to bill, operate, and grow
features.description: BillSutra brings invoicing, operations, and reporting into one clean workflow so your team spends less time switching tabs and more time moving the business forward.

items.invoiceManagementDescription: Create polished invoices, track payment status, and keep collections moving.
items.inventoryTrackingDescription: Monitor stock, warehouses, and reorder risks before operations get blocked.
items.clientSupplierDescription: Keep every business relationship, outstanding amount, and purchase history organized.
items.insightsDescription: See revenue, cash movement, product demand, and business performance at a glance.
items.gstSupportDescription: Stay ready for Indian billing workflows with tax-friendly invoice structure and controls.
items.smartAssistantDescription: Ask questions in plain language and get quick answers powered by live business data.

preview.title: See the whole business in one clear workspace
preview.description: From receivables and invoices to stock movement and team actions, BillSutra gives operators one place to run the business with confidence.
preview.pointOne: Keep billing, inventory, and purchases connected instead of scattered across separate tools.
preview.pointTwo: See cash pressure, stock signals, and customer follow-ups without building manual reports.
preview.pointThree: Give modern teams a clean workspace that scales from daily billing to growth planning.
preview.cardOneDescription: Turn follow-up into a daily operating habit instead of a month-end scramble.
preview.cardTwoDescription: Track inventory risk, payment gaps, and workflow health in the same view.

howItWorks.title: Get your team running in three simple steps

one.title: Set up your business
one.description: Add your brand, billing defaults, customers, and product catalog in one guided flow.

two.title: Create invoices and manage inventory
two.description: Run day-to-day billing, purchases, stock adjustments, and payment follow-ups from one workspace.

three.title: Track growth with insights
three.description: Use dashboards, trends, and forecasts to make better decisions as the business scales.

usp.title: Built to feel simple for operators and powerful for decision-makers
usp.description: BillSutra is designed for teams that want modern software without losing the practical workflows Indian businesses rely on every day.

items.platformDescription: Billing, inventory, purchases, contacts, and operations live in one coordinated system.
items.gstDescription: GST-ready invoicing and local pricing flows make day-to-day operations easier to trust.
items.simpleDescription: A clean interface helps teams move faster without giving up advanced controls.
items.insightsDescription: Use demand signals, cash visibility, and reporting to stay ahead of bottlenecks.
items.languageDescription: Switch between English and Hindi so every user can work comfortably.

testimonials.title: Teams use BillSutra to replace manual billing chaos with calm operations
testimonials.description: From retailers to distributors and service businesses, teams rely on BillSutra to keep billing and operations in sync.

one.quote: BillSutra helped us move from scattered spreadsheets to one dashboard where invoicing, stock checks, and customer balances finally stay aligned.
one.name: Priya Sharma

two.quote: Our warehouse and sales teams now work from the same system, so we catch stock pressure earlier and bill faster without duplicate work.
two.name: Aarav Mehta

three.quote: The interface is simple enough for our whole team to adopt, but powerful enough to give me the reports I need every week.
three.name: Neha Verma

cta.title: Start managing your business smarter today.
cta.description: Bring billing, inventory, sales, and insights into one modern workspace your whole team can trust.

footer.description: BillSutra helps modern teams run billing, inventory, and business operations from one polished workspace.

loginPage.title: Sign in to keep your business in motion.
loginPage.description: Track invoices, monitor stock, and oversee cash flow with a single dashboard tailored for teams.
loginPage.formDescription: Use your work email to continue to BillSutra.

registerPage.title: Create your billing workspace in minutes.
registerPage.description: Centralize customers, products, invoices, and payment follow-ups from day one.
registerPage.formDescription: Sign up with your work email to access the dashboard.

forgotPage.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPage.description: Enter your email and we will send a reset link.

resetPage.title: Reset your password
resetPage.description: Choose a strong password to keep your billing data protected.

customers.subtitle: Keep contact details and recent activity handy.

insights.title: Insights and Forecasting
insights.subtitle: See projected sales, cashflow, profit, and the alerts that need attention next.

summary.title: Predictions from live business activity
summary.description: These cards summarize the next likely direction of receipts, profit, and cash movement using the latest transactions.

trends.title: Past vs predicted performance
trends.description: Compare historical receipts and profitability against projected movement for the next few months.

alerts.title: Risks that need attention
alerts.description: Focus on warnings first so collections, profitability, and cashflow stay healthy.

ai.title: Actionable business suggestions
ai.description: Plain-language suggestions generated from your receipts, expenses, and expected future movement.

alerts.empty: No major risks flagged right now.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Ask direct questions about your latest business data and get instant answers.
assistant.introTitle: Ask live questions about sales, profit, pending payments, and cashflow
assistant.introDescription: The assistant checks your latest financial data for every query and answers in the same language you use.
assistant.chatDescription: Ask about profit, total sales, pending payments, and cashflow.
assistant.placeholder: Ask a question about your business...
assistant.thinking: Assistant is checking your latest data...
assistant.error: I could not fetch the latest answer right now. Please try again in a moment.
assistant.welcome: Hello! I can answer live questions using your Bill Sutra financial data. Ask me about profit, sales, pending payments, or cashflow.

quickPrompts.profit: What is my profit this month?
quickPrompts.pending: How much is pending in payments?
quickPrompts.cashflow: What is my cashflow this month?

dashboard.title: Welcome back, {name}.
dashboard.subtitle: A sharper view of sales, cash movement, profit trend, and inventory demand.

hero.operatingViewTitle: Revenue, receivables, supplier dues, and next actions in one operating view.
hero.operatingViewDescription: The dashboard now leads with what needs attention first, then steps through performance, forecasting, and records so the page is easier to scan on every screen size.

focus.title: Priority items
focus.description: Surface the tasks most likely to need action before you dive into the charts.

overview.title: Business pulse at a glance
overview.description: Primary KPIs are grouped together first so revenue, spend, collections, and payables can be compared without hunting through the page.

profit.title: How profitability is moving over time
profit.description: Profit cards are separated from operational balances to reduce cognitive load and make period-over-period changes easier to read.

performance.title: Revenue, cash, and payment mix
performance.description: Charts are grouped by financial story so users can move from booked activity to actual cash movement and then to payment behavior.

forecasting.title: Demand, inventory, and forward-looking signals
forecasting.description: Forecast widgets sit together with product demand and risk alerts so replenishment decisions can be made from one area.

operations.title: Alerts, billing health, and collection queue
operations.description: Action-oriented cards are grouped ahead of supporting insight panels so the dashboard helps users decide what to do next, not just what happened.

records.title: Transactions and recent invoice history
records.description: Dense data views are pushed toward the end of the page and paired with direct navigation, which keeps the main dashboard focused while still making detail accessible.

primaryMetrics.totalSalesDescription: Paid direct sales and invoice collections combined for the selected range.
primaryMetrics.totalSalesHelper: Direct sales exclude invoice-synced entries; invoice payments are merged with paid fallback handling to avoid duplicates.
primaryMetrics.totalPurchasesDescription: Spend committed to stock and supply purchases.
primaryMetrics.totalPurchasesHelper: Sum of purchase total_amount (fallback total) for the selected range.
primaryMetrics.pendingSalesPaymentsDescription: Outstanding customer payments still to collect.
primaryMetrics.pendingSalesPaymentsHelper: Sum of pending_amount on sales in the selected range.
primaryMetrics.pendingPurchasePaymentsDescription: Outstanding supplier payments for recorded purchases.
primaryMetrics.pendingPurchasePaymentsHelper: Sum of pending_amount on purchases in the selected range.

profitMetrics.todayDescription: Today's net after purchases and expenses.
profitMetrics.weeklyHelper: (Sales - purchases - expenses) over the last 7 days.
profitMetrics.monthlyDescription: Current month profit after all outflows.
profitMetrics.yearlyDescription: Year-to-date profit after purchases and expenses.

operations.invoiceStatisticsDescription: Keep invoice totals, pending items, and overdue follow-ups visible without opening the records page.
operations.collectionQueueDescription: The highest pending balances are surfaced first so collection work stays short and targeted.

records.recentInvoiceHistoryDescription: Recent invoices are sorted by date and trimmed to the latest five so the dashboard stays readable.

cashflow.title: Cash flow summary
cashflow.description: Current-month collections versus outgoing purchase payments and expenses.
cashflow.empty: No cash flow activity recorded for this period yet.
cashflow.footnote: Includes direct sale receipts, invoice collections, paid purchase amounts, and recorded expenses.

paymentMethods.sectionDescription: Breakdown of paid sales and purchases by payment type.

paymentMethods.purchasesEmpty: No recorded purchase payments in this period.

salesForecast.receiptsDescription: Monthly sales forecast uses real cash receipts from paid sales and invoice collections.
